rulings.Case Title: RAJ NAIDU VS. CALIFORNIA PUBLIC UTILITIES COMMISSION et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, JANUARY 23, 2007, LINE 3. DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PUBLIC UTILITIES COMMISSION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED, FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF. 1.) JACKSON: CANNOT SUMMARILY ADJUDICATE THE ISSUE BECAUSE IT DOES NOT DISPOSE OF A CAUSE OF ACTION. 2.) PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY OF KAZEMDAH'S CONDUCT IS NOT REBUTTED; SUCH CONDUCT UNDERMINES DEFENDANT'S LEGITIMATE BUSINESS REASONS RELATED TO THE DISCRIMINATION AND RETALIATION CLAIMS. 3.) THERE ARE DISPUTED FACTS ON THE HARASSMENT AND FAILURE TO PREVENT CLAIMS, IN PARTICULAR HOW SEVERE AND PERVASIVE THE CONDITIONS WERE. 4.) REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. C. C. P. 128.7 CONTROLS. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: NAHUM GUZIK VS. THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY 0F CALIFORNIA et al
